headline: Beyond Cloud & Memory: Infrastructure ETFs to Buy Amid AI Data Center Boom
summary: ETFs like PAVE offer diversified exposure to AI data center power infrastructure as utilities and grid equipment firms benefit from rising AI build-out spending.

headline: Can Grid Modernization Become Quanta's Next Growth Driver?
